chin_falam.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter cu Vawlei nakin voi 11 a kau i, a chungah Vawlei 1,300 a lut khawh! Solar system chungah ngannak cu a i dang tuk.

chin_falam.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Zeitikcia hmanh si lo! Saturn cu Vawlei nakin voi 95 a rit nain a cung gravity cu 1.06g lawng a si, a ngan tuk i a rithau a tlawm ruangah. Rithau cu rithau LE a kau he a i pehtlai.

chin_falam.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Nunnak hmun (asiloah "Goldilocks zone") cu arfi in hlatnak, planet a cung ah ti tui a um khawhnak hmun a si. Kan solar system ah Venus cu a chung donghnak ah a um, Vawlei cu laili ah a um, Mars cu a leng donghnak ah a um. Asinain ti tui ngeih awkah van thli le magnet hmun ttha zong a herh!
chin_falam.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Ni ceunak nih planet a cung a lumter tikah, a cung nih lumnak (infrared) a chuahter. Greenhouse gas (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) nih hi lumnak hi a la i a chuahter tthan, cutin planet kha a lumter. Vawlei greenhouse cu +33°C a si (nunnak a tha). Venus mi cu +510°C (dinlo). Mars nih a ngei loin a si (-60°C). Greenhouse gas zeizat a um timi nih a donghnak a khiah!
chin_falam.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Planet magnet hmun nih "magnetosphere" a ser — hmuh khawh lomi venhimnak, ni thli (Ni in a rami charge thil) a hlonhtu. Vawlei magnetosphere nih kan van thli a venh i nunnak a si khawhter. Mars nih kum bilian 4 hlan ah a magnet hmun a hlawh i, a van thli tlawmte in an la ta. Jupiter magnetosphere cu Vawlei mi nakin voi 20,000 a ttha deuh!
chin_falam.why_isn_t_pluto_a_planet: Zeicah dah Pluto cu Planet a si lo?
chin_falam.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: 2006 ah International Astronomical Union nih planet caah bia pathum a khiah: (1) Ni a kulh ✓, (2) A luan awkah rithau a tlin ✓, (3) A kulhnak lam kha thil dang in "a thianter" ✗. Pluto cu a kulhnak hmun kha Kuiper Belt thil thongkhat tampi he an i chunhkhawm, cucaah "dwarf planet" tiah an ti. Hi ruangah a lawmhawk a si lo ti a si lo — New Horizons nih a rian a tuah rih ti a langhter!
chin_falam.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: Kum bilian tampi chungah gravity tikulh ttthanak nih thla heinak kha a ttihter i a kulh caan he a i tluk. A donghnak: hmai pakhat lawng cu planet lei ah a hmai peng. Kan Thla cu Vawlei he a i tlaih. Mercury cu Ni he a cheu lawng in a i tlaih (3:2). Pluto le Charon cu an i tlaih tawn — hmai khat lawng an i hmuhter peng!
chin_falam.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Biosignature cu hlanlio asiloah atu nunnak langhternak zeihmanh a si. Science mi nih an hawlmi: (1) ti tui, (2) organic molecule, (3) van thli ah oxygen asiloah methane bantuk gas, nunnak a ser lo ahcun a um kho lomi, (4) tha chuahnak hmun. Kan solar system ah hmun tha bik: Mars (ti hlun), Europa (vun tang tikulh), Enceladus (ti tuithlipi), le Titan (methane liva).

chin_falam.our_sun_and_planets_accrete: Kan Ni le planet an i pumh
chin_falam.expansion_accelerating_due_to_dark_ene: Dark energy ruangah zamnak a rang chin
chin_falam.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Van cu kum bilian 13.8 a ngei cang. A rit tuk le a lum tuk in a thawk, cun a zam i a dai chin. Galaxy cu kum bilian 1 ah an cang, kan Ni cu kum bilian 9 ah, kanmah cu kum bilian 13.8 ah kan um.
chin_falam.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Vawlei an phak hlan ah a rami asteroid hmeh. NASA DART rian bantuk planet venhimnak.
chin_falam.real_nasa_program_dart_double_asteroid: NASA rian taktak: DART (Double Asteroid Redirection Test) nih 2022 ah Dimorphos kulhnak a thleng khawh. Planetary Defense Coordination Office nih Vawlei a naihmi thil 30,000+ a zoh.
chin_falam.four_galaxy_morphologies_spirals_like_: Galaxy ser-ning pali. Kan mi bantuk kualnak nih arfi sernak a langhtermi kut a ngei. Elliptical cu a hlun, irregular cu a i hnawnh.
chin_falam.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Aperture a ngan deuh nih ceunak a tam deuh a pumh i thil hmete a fiangter. Magnification cu na ruah nakin a biapi lo deuh.
chin_falam.aperture_matters_more_than_magnificati: Aperture cu magnification nakin a biapi deuh! Objective a ngan deuh nih ceunak a tam deuh a pumh i thil hmete a fiangter. Aperture cm khat ah 20x nakin a tam deuhmi magnification cu a der ter lawng. JWST mirror 6.5 m nih Big Bang hnu i kum milian za hmasa bik i galaxy a cawn.
chin_falam.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Sannak slider kha Vawlei van thli chungah cunglei ah hnol. Hnehnak a tlawm chin, lumnak a i thleng, chemistry zong cheu cio ah a i thleng.
chin_falam.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Khuachan cu hika ah a cang. Sannak a sang chin tikah lumnak a tlawm chin.
chin_falam.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Ozone cheu nih UV a la. Sannak a sang chin tikah lumnak a pung chin.
chin_falam.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Meteor cu hika ah an kang. Cheu a dai bik (-90°C).
chin_falam.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS cu hika ah a kulh (400km). Aurora ceunak. Thli a hme tuk nain a lum.
chin_falam.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Van donghnak. Thli cu van ah a chuak ta.
chin_falam.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Galileo 1610 zohnak: Venus cu ser-ning a i thleng. Hi nih Venus cu Vawlei si loin Ni a kulh ti a langhter.
chin_falam.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Galileo 1610 hmuhnak: Thla bantuk Venus zong ser-ning a ngei
chin_falam.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: 1610 ah Galileo nih Venus kha a telescope in a zoh i Thla bantuk ser-ning a i thleng ti a hmuh. Hi nih Venus cu Vawlei si loin Ni a kulh ti a langhter. Ptolemy nih Vawlei kha laili ah a chiahmi ser-ning nih Venus a dirmi kha a fianter kho lo. Copernicus nih Ni cu laili ah a um ti a chimmi caah langhternak ngan a si.
chin_falam.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Magnet hmun nih ni thli a hlonh i van thli a venh. Mars nih a pahnih in a hlawh; cucaah ramkhal a si.
chin_falam.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Vawlei magnet hmun nih ni thli a tam bik a hlonh i, van thli + nunnak a venh. Mars nih kum bilian ~4 hlan ah a magnet hmun a hlawh i a van thli tlawmte in a hlawh. Jupiter nih solar system chungah hmun a ttha bik a ngei.
chin_falam.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: Ngannak zohnak le hlatnak zohnak thlen. A tluk tein an pahnih tikhat te ah kan langhter kho lo — van cu a hoih tuk ruangah.
chin_falam.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: A tluk taktak in tikhat te ah langhter cu a har. Vawlei cu bekar si seh, Ni cu fut 200 hlat ah tuikulh khebang ngan a si lai. Hlatnak a tluk tein an si ahcun, planet cu hmuh khawh lomi hmun tete an can. Hmanthlak a tam bik nih an i pum hlen.
chin_falam.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Thrust hman law na tlaknak ttihter. 2.5 m/s nakin nem deuh in tla, hlawnhcun na rawh lai. Mansi zoh — a hoih te i dir awkah a tlin lo.
chin_falam.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 cu Thla ah a tlak lioah mansi a dih dengmang. Neil Armstrong nih tlaknak hmun a nemmi hawl awkah autopilot kha a kut in a thleng. A tlak tikah mansi ~second 25 lawng a tang.
chin_falam.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Hmun thim law ceunak nih a phak awkah caan zeizat a hman ti zoh. Solar system leng ah hlatnak cu a ngan tuk.
chin_falam.edge_of_observable_universe_2: Kan hmuh khawhmi vawlei cung a donghnak
chin_falam.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Ceunak cu 300,000 km/s a kal. Thil hlatmi cu ceunak an chuahnak caan bantuk in kan hmuh. Kan hmuhmi Ni cu minute 8 a rawh cangmi a si; Proxima Centauri cu kum 4. Andromeda Galaxy cu kum milian 2.5.
chin_falam.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Ni cu khoika ah dah a chuak i a tlak? Na latitude + ni cungah a hmang. Maine le Arctic Circle tahchunh.
chin_falam.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Ni lam cu latitude + caan cungah a hmang. Laili ah ni cu lu cung tak ah a kal. Arctic Circle ah, khuahal solstice ah zanlai ni + khuasik solstice ah dawnglei zan. Maine i Portland: khuahal lai ah ni a sang; khuasik lai ah ni cu vawlei donghnak lawng a phan.
chin_falam.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Thla cheukhat ah nunnak a um kho: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede cu vun tang tikulh an ngei. Atu ah rian nih an hawl lio.
chin_falam.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Vun tang tikulh ah Vawlei rilipi nakin ti voi 2 a um. Rilipi niang ah hydrothermal vent a um kho. JUICE + Europa Clipper rian an kal lio.
chin_falam.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini nih ti + organics + hydrogen + silica a kahmi tuithlipi a hmuh. Plume chemistry nih nunnak a tha khawhmi thil + tha chuahnak a langhter.
chin_falam.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: N2 + CH4 van thli a thah. A cung ah methane tui liva. A tang ah ti-ammonia tikulh. Nunnak a um kho nain a dang tuk lai.
chin_falam.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Thla a ngan bik. Vun tang tikulh caah Hubble langhternak a ttha. JUICE rian nih a cawn lai.
chin_falam.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Solar system chungah a cung a hlun bik kan hmuhmi. Vun tang tikulh a um kho. Jupiter thla dang nakin radiation a tlawm deuh.
chin_falam.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Solar system chungah mei tlang a tam bikmi thil. Mei tlang 400+ a nun. Sulfur dioxide van thli. Nunnak khawh a si lo.
chin_falam.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Mars cu nunnak khawh awkah zeidah a herh? Greenhouse gas, tuikhal hlawhnak, le thing khuhnak thlenh — Mars a i thleng ti zoh.
chin_falam.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Mars serṭhat cu kum thongkhat tampi a hman lai. A herhmi: van thli thahter (greenhouse gas), a cung lumter (tuikhal a hlaw), thing chuah (oxygen). NASA cawnnak nih atu Mars CO2 cu a hme tuk i thil ngan an phorh lo ahcun a si kho lo ti a langhter. Atu tiang science fiction a si rih.
chin_falam.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble nih van hmun hoih kha ni 10 a zoh i galaxy hlat 3000 a hmuh. Naih tein zoh — hmun a der lomi khat cio cu galaxy a si.
chin_falam.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Hmun a der lomi khat cio cu arfi milian in bilian za tiang ngeimi galaxy a si
chin_falam.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: 1995 ah Hubble nih van hmun dum tete kha ni 10 a zoh. A donghnak: hmanthlak khat chungah galaxy hlat 3000. JWST nih hi hi a thuk deuh a tuah cang, Big Bang hnu i kum milian za hmasa bik i galaxy a cawn.
chin_falam.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Arfi a lum deuh cu a hring deuh in a langh; a dai deuh cu a sen deuh. Spectral phun ning in OBAFGKM in arfi an thleidang.
chin_falam.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Red dwarf — arfi a dai bik le a tam bik (arfi vialte i 75%)
chin_falam.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Orange dwarf — Ni nakin a daih deuh, a nunnak a saw deuh
chin_falam.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Hring — arfi a lum bik le a tlawm bik, an nunnak cu kum milian lawng
chin_falam.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Arfi rong = lumnak. OBAFGKM spectral zam (a lum bik in a dai bik tiang) philhlonak bia: 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Arfi a lum deuh cu a ngan deuh + a ceu deuh + a nunnak a tawi deuh.
chin_falam.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Zeicah dah Thla nih hmai khat lawng a langhter peng? Tikulh tthatnak nih a heinak a ttihter. Hlatnak + rithau nih i tlaihnak caan zeitin dah a thleng ti zoh.
chin_falam.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Tikulh tthatnak nih thla heinak kha tlawmte in a ttihter i a kulhnak caan he a i tluk. Kan Thla cu a i tlaih cang: hmai khat lawng Vawlei lam ah a hmai peng. Mercury cu Ni he 3:2 resonance ah a um (a i tlaih tak lo).
chin_falam.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Kua khat cio hmeh. Planet science mi taktak nih a cung kum an hngalh awkah kua an rel — kua a tam = a hlun deuh.
chin_falam.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Kua relnak cu science mi nih planet a cung kum an hngalhnak lam a si. Kua a tam = a cung a hlun deuh. Thla tlang cu kua a tam tuk (a hlun tuk); maria cu lava a thar deuh a si.
chin_falam.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Rithau nih spacetime a kau ter. Rithau hnol law kua a thuk chin ti zoh. Khebang kha hei law a chungah a tla ning zoh.
chin_falam.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: Einstein general relativity nih rithau nih spacetime a kau ter tiah a ti. Thil nih tthatnak an hmuh lo — a kaumi ser-ning chungah geodesic an zulh lawng. Hi cu gravity a si. Kua dum nih spacetime a kau ter ngai i ceunak hmanh a chuah kho lo.
chin_falam.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Asteroid phun pathum: C, S, M. Lung laktu bu nih thir + platinum caah M phun kha an zoh.
chin_falam.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: A tam bik (75%). A dum, a hlun, ti a tam. A leng kulh ah kan hmuh.
chin_falam.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Lung phun (17%). A zaang deuh, silicate lung + thir in a si. A chung kulh ah kan hmuh.
chin_falam.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Thir a tam (8%). A tam bik cu thir + nickel. A rawhmi protoplanet laili in a si kho. Lung laknak hmun.
chin_falam.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Big Bang hnu kum 380,000 in ceunak. A thlengnak hmete cu galaxy vialte i ci a si.
chin_falam.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Lumnak thlengnak ~0.001% — thil vialte i ci
chin_falam.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB cu Big Bang hnu kum 380,000 in a tangmi ceunak a si. Lumnak thlengnak hmete nih thil a rit deuhnak hmun a langhter. Cu hmun rit deuh hna cu nihin kan hmuhmi galaxy + arfi vialte ah an tho. Penzias + Wilson nih 1965 ah an hmuh mansang (Nobel Prize 1978).
chin_falam.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Saturn kulh cu trilian tampi cheu ah ti tuikhal 99% a si. Kum milian 100 lawng an ngei kho.
chin_falam.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Saturn kulh cu vutdai in inn tluk cheu tiang ti tuikhal thil a si. 282,000 km an zam nain an thahnak cu km 1 a phak lo. Kum milian ~100 hlan ah thla a rawhmi in a cang men — a thar rih!
chin_falam.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Laili, a cung, van thli, le nunnak thim. Vawlei zeiphun dah na ser ti zoh.
chin_falam.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar cu magnet ceunak ngeimi neutron arfi a heitu a si. Ceunak nih a luan tikah lawng Vawlei nih a hmuh.
chin_falam.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Pulsar cu a rangte in a heimi neutron arfi a si. A magnet dawnglei nih radiation ceunak a kah. Ceunak nih kan cungah a luan tikah lawng kan hmuh — tikulh ceunak inn bantuk. Cheukhat nih second khat ah voi 700 an kah. Jocelyn Bell Burnell nih 1967 ah hmasa bik a hmuh.
chin_falam.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Ni in charge thil a luang i Vawlei a tong. Thli a ttha deuh = aurora a tam deuh + GPS harnak.
chin_falam.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Ni thli cu Ni in zungzal in a luangmi charge thil (a tam bik cu proton + electron) a si. A rannak cu 250-800 km/s karlak ah a um. Khuathli ttha nih aurora a ser i GPS + khuahlei zam a hrawh khawh. Carrington 1859 thil: telegraph an mei i an kang.
chin_falam.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS cu minute 90 cio ah Vawlei a kulh. Caanhrawng ah ni ceunak ah, caanhrawng ah Vawlei hlim ah.
chin_falam.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS cu 400 km sang ah 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h) in a kulh. Minute 90 cio ah kulh khat a dih — cucaah van khualtlawngtu nih ni khat ah ni chuahnak + ni tlaknak voi 16 an hmuh. ISS cu mi nih van ah an sermi thil a ngan bik a si.
chin_falam.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: Voyager 1 + 2 cu 1977 ah an chuah. Atu ah arfi karlak van ah an um; Voyager 1 cu 2012 ah heliopause a luan i Voyager 2 cu 2018 ah.
chin_falam.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: Voyager 1 + 2 cu a leng planet cawn awkah 1977 ah an chuah. An pahnih in 2012 + 2018 ah heliopause (ni thli donghnak) an luan — atu ah arfi karlak van ah an um. Pakhat cio nih Golden Record a phorh, cuka ah chibai + hla a um, an hmutu zeihmanh caah.
chin_falam.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury cu kum tlawmte cio ah Ni hmai ah a luan. A luan ti zoh — asinain solar filter ttha he lawng.
chin_falam.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Solar filter TTHA he lawng zoh — na mit in zoh hlah!
chin_falam.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Luannak cu Mercury (asiloah Venus) nih Vawlei + Ni karlak ah a luan tikah a cang. Ni cungah hmun dum tete bantuk a langh. Mercury luannak a dawtmi: November 13, 2032. Venus luannak a dawtmi: December 2117 — 2125 tiang a cang ti lai lo.
chin_falam.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault nih 1851 ah pendulum ngan in Vawlei a hei ti a langhter. A zam kalnak cu dawnglei ah a rang deuhin a hei.
chin_falam.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault nih 1851 ah pendulum ngan in Vawlei heinak a langhter. A zam kalnak cu a hei bantuk a langh, Vawlei nih a tang ah a hei ruangah. Dawnglei ah: suimilam 24. Laili ah: zeitikhmanh ah. Maine ah: ~suimilam 34.
chin_falam.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Saturn dawnglei ah 30,000 km a kaumi kil ruk khuathli tak a um. Voyager nih 1981 ah a hmuh.
chin_falam.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: A dinlomi thil 30,000 km a kau — Vawlei a kau nakin voi 2 nakin a tam
chin_falam.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn cu a dawnglei ah kil ruk khuathli tak a ngei — Voyager nih hmasa bik in hmanthlak a la (1981), Cassini nih a fiang ter. Kil ruk cu 30,000 km a kau i a dinh lo. Zeicah dah kil ruk a si? Van thli jet stream ser-ning + Rossby wave.
chin_falam.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Suimilam hmasa bik. Ni cu van ah a kal tikah, gnomon nih hlim a heimi a chuahter i suimilam a langhter.
chin_falam.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Ni suimilam cu thir suimilam hlan ah kum thongkhat tampi a um cang. Ni cu van ah a kal tikah, gnomon hlim cu a hei. Egypt hlun, Grik, Rom, Chinese vialte nih ni suimilam a dik a ser. Tuchan mi nih daylight saving time + equation of time an remh awk a si.
chin_falam.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: Galaxy 80 cu kan kulh ah ceunak-kum milian 10 chungah an um. Milky Way + Andromeda cu kum bilian 4-5 hrawng ah an i ton kho — 2025 cawnnak nih 50/50 hrawng a si tiah a ti.
chin_falam.2_5_mly_away_heading_toward_us: Mly 2.5 hlat — kan lam ah a ra!
chin_falam.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Local Group — ceunak-kum milian 10 chungah galaxy ~80
chin_falam.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Kan Local Group ah galaxy ~80 an um i Milky Way + Andromeda nih an uk. Andromeda cu 110 km/s in a ra naih — kum bilian 4-5 hrawng ah tonnak a cang kho. A cang ahcun: Milkomeda galaxy ngan.
chin_falam.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Asteroid zeitluk nih dah nunnak zeitluk a thah? Lung hmete in dinosaur thattu tiang tahchunh.
chin_falam.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Van thli lutnak nih lung a tam bik 5m tang cu a hlawh. Chelyabinsk 2013 (20m) nih hmanhsanh a rawh nain kua a um lo. Tunguska 1908 (50m) nih ram km² 2000 a hlaw. Chicxulub 66Ma (10km) nih dinosaur a thah.
chin_falam.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: CME nih Ni in plasma ton bilian tampi a kah. Ni tlawmte hnu ah aurora dawh + GPS harnak a chuahter khawh.
chin_falam.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Coronal Mass Ejection nih plasma ton bilian tampi kha 1-2 milian mph in van ah a kah. Vawlei phak awkah ni 1-5 a hman. CME ttha nih geomagnetic khuathli, aurora ceumi a ser i vantlangkuang + khuahlei zam a hrawh khawh.
chin_falam.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid cu caan cio in a kikir. An caan nih an ceunak taktak a langhter — van tahnak.
chin_falam.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Cepheid variable cu caan cio in a kikir. An caan cu an ceunak taktak he a i pehtlai (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Science mi nih caan an tah i ceunak taktak + hlatnak hngalh awkah an hman.
chin_falam.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Kulhnak cu kual in ellipse saw tiang a um. Eccentricity thlenh law planet bantuk asiloah comet bantuk lam ttial.
chin_falam.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Kulhnak eccentricity cu 0 (kual tak) in 1 (parabolic chuahnak) tiang a si. Planet cu kual bantuk an si. Comet cu artui bantuk tuk — Ni naih tiang an kal i a leng lam ah hlat tiang an kal. Hyperbolic kulhnak (e>1) cu solar system ah voikhat lawng luannak a si.
chin_falam.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Vawlei van thli nih wavelength tampi a khap. Kan hmuhmi ceunak, radio, le infrared cheukhat cu vawlei an phak.
chin_falam.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Kan hmuhmi ceunak, radio wave, le infrared cheukhat cu vawlei an phak
chin_falam.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Vawlei van thli nih wavelength tampi a khap. Kan hmuhmi ceunak, radio, le infrared hmanhsanh cheukhat cu vawlei an phak; UV, X-ray, gamma-ray, le infrared tampi cu Hubble, JWST, Chandra, le Fermi bantuk van zohnak innṭha an herh.
chin_falam.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Spectra nih lumnak, a serning, kalnak, le a thonak dinhmun hmelchunh a langhter.
chin_falam.cool_giant_atmosphere_4000_k: Arfi ngan a dai van thli: 4,000 K hrawng
chin_falam.excited_gas_10000_k: Gas a thawhmi: 10,000 K hrawng a si tawn
chin_falam.expanding_ejecta_thousands_km_s: A zam chinmi thil: km/s thongkhat tampi
chin_falam.spectral_line_strength_caution: Zung tthatnak cu a tam le a tlawm tahnak fawi a si lo: lumnak, rithau, le ionization nih zei thil dah a ttha bik in a langh timi zong an khiah. Hi zung hna hi cawnnak model a fawi termi a si.
chin_falam.spectra_life_paths_note: Hi tahchunhnak hna hi caanzin khat a si lo: Ni bantuk arfi cu arfi sen ngan le planetary nebula a can khawh, Type II supernova cu rithau ngan arfi nunnak a dinh ternak a si.
chin_falam.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Vawlei cu suimilam khat ah 15° a hei. Tokyo ah zeitik dah sunlai a si, Portland ah zeitik dah ni a chuak ti zoh.
chin_falam.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Vawlei cu suimilam khat ah 15° a hei. UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) cu vawlei pumpi hmanmi a si. Caan hmun cu ±suimilam in a i dang. Portland Maine cu UTC-5 (EST) asiloah UTC-4 (EDT). Vawlei pumpi ah Vawlei a cheu cu ni ceunak ah a um i a cheu cu zan ah a um.
chin_falam.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Kan ruahnak he a i lomi lo van science thil 12 hmeh in zoh.
chin_falam.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Cazin cauk hmanthlak cu a hmaan lo. Thla cu an ttialmi nakin a hlat deuh. A tluk taktak zoh.
chin_falam.moon_too_big_close: Thla (a ngan tuk + a naih tuk)
chin_falam.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Cazin cauk a tam bik nih Thla cu a ngan tuk le a naih tuk in an ttial. A hmaanmi: Thla a kau cu Vawlei mi i 1/4 a si, Thla tiang hlatnak cu Vawlei a kau ~voi 30 a si. Ceunak nih second 1.3 a hman.
chin_falam.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter cu ni a tawi bik a ngei (suimilam 10). Venus cu a saw bik (Vawlei ni 243!).
chin_falam.day_length_across_the_solar_system_log: Solar System chungah ni sawnak (log tahnak)
chin_falam.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter cu a rangte in a hei. Venus cu a kum nakin a ttih deuhin a hei.
chin_falam.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Gas giant cu an sernak ruangah a rangte in an hei. Venus cu a ttih bik in a hei, ni tikulh + van thli thah nih a hnut men. Vawlei cu Thla gravity ruangah kum za khat cio ah ~millisecond 1.7 a ttih chin.
chin_falam.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Ni thihnak dihlak cu lam tete lawng a khuh. 2024 ni thihnak lam cu Maine dawnglei a luan.
chin_falam.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Ni thihnak dihlak cu ~100-150 km a kaumi lam tete ah lawng a cang. April 8, 2024 ni thihnak cu Maine dawnglei a luan — Maine mi tampi cu dihlak zoh awkah dawnglei ah an kal. Maine in kan hmuh khawhmi ni thihnak dihlak a dawtmi: May 1, 2079.
chin_falam.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Sagan Van Kalendar: kum bilian 13.8 kha kum khat ah. Mi cu second hnu bik ah an ra.
chin_falam.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Carl Sagan Van Kalendar: kum bilian 13.8 kha kum 1 ah a tawiter. Big Bang = Jan 1. Atu = Dec 31 zanlai. Mi cu second hnu bik ah an chuak. Mibu ukhawknak cu second cheu hnu bik ah an um.
chin_falam.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Van dang mibu zeizat dah an um? Kan hngalh lomi thil cio thlenh law lehnak zoh.
chin_falam.in_our_milky_way_galaxy_at_any_time: kan Milky Way Galaxy chungah caan zeitik hmanh ah
chin_falam.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: System khat ah nunnak khawhmi zat
chin_falam.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake 1961: mibu dang zat ruahnak. Thil a tam bik cu kan hngalh lo — lehnak cu <1 (kanmah lawng) in milian tampi tiang a si. Lehnak a pek nakin kan hngalh lomi kha a langhter deuh. Slider thlenh law a donghnak zeitin dah a thleng rang ti zoh.
chin_falam.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Telescope a ngan bik le a ttha bik 12: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, le an zohmi.
chin_falam.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Optical/UV/IR van telescope. Kum 30+ rian a tuah.
chin_falam.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Infrared van telescope. L2 Lagrange point ah.
chin_falam.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Mauna Kea, Hawaii ah 10m telescope pahnih.
chin_falam.66_antenna_radio_array_chilean_desert: Antenna 66 radio bu, Chile ramkhal ah.
chin_falam.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Optical/UV/IR van telescope. Rian a tuah rih.
chin_falam.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Infrared van telescope, 2020 ah a dinh.
chin_falam.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Hmailei radio telescope, Australia + South Africa.
chin_falam.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Vawlei ah telescope a ttha bik 12. Aperture (cm) cu mirror ngan a kau a si. Aperture a ngan deuh = ceunak a tam deuh + thil hmete a fiang deuh. Van telescope nih van thli hrawhnak a pial.
chin_falam.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Arfi rithau ngan cu an nung rang i an thi rang. Rithau thlenh law arfi zeitluk dah a kang ti zoh.
chin_falam.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Arfi rithau ngan nih mansi a rangte in a kang. Nunnak sawnak ∝ M^-2.5. Ni: Gyr 10 (a cheu ah kan um cang). 10 M☉: Myr 30 lawng. 0.1 M☉ red dwarf: kum trilian tampi.
chin_falam.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: Na kalnak zoh: planet na hawlrelmi, nambat na hmuhmi, rian na ttialmi.
chin_falam.this_tool_features_35_interactive_mini: Hi thil hi nih van science, physics, le hawlrelnak a hunmi tuahnak thil hmete 35+ a ngei. Kua dum sernak in Thla ah tlaknak zaanlawng mongnak tiang, Solar System le a leng na hawlrel khawh.
chin_falam.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: Grik hlun van science in JWST tiang thil biapi 16. Na hngalh awk min hna.
chin_falam.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Aristarchus in JWST tiang kum 2300 khualtlawnnak. Hmuhnak khat cio nih a hmasa mi cungah a ser. Science cu relay tlarhnak a si — van science mi khat cio cu a hmasa mi liang cungah a dir.
chin_falam.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: A cung lumnak phun le an khiahtu spectral hmelchunh tahchunh.
chin_falam.spectral_class_size_caution: Kual ngannak cu duh in kan i tluk ter. Spectral phun nih lumnak le zung ser-ning a chim, a kau asiloah ceunak lawng a si lo; luminosity phun V cu main sequence, III cu giant, I cu supergiant a si.
chin_falam.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Cakhat khat nih arfi a dang tuk a khuh khawh: Proxima Centauri cu M dwarf a si, Betelgeuse cu M supergiant a si. Ni cu G2 V a si.
chin_falam.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars van thli cu voi 100 a hme deuh i a tam bik cu CO₂ a si. Gas serning + hnehnak tahchunh.
chin_falam.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Mars van thli cu Vawlei mi nakin voi 100 a hme deuh. A serning: CO₂ 95%. Mars ah thaw awkah oxygen + hnehnak voi 100 a tam deuh na herh lai. Thing khuhter awkah nitrogen a um hrimhrim lo.
chin_falam.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: Kua dum biafang biapi 10: event horizon, singularity, spaghettification, Hawking radiation.
chin_falam.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Event Horizon Telescope nih M87* kua dum hmanthlak hmasa bik (2019) + Sgr A* (2022) a la. Kulh oren = ceunak a chuah kho lonak khebang dum kulh ah ceunak a kau.
chin_falam.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Planet panga nih aurora an ngei. Vawlei mi cu a hring/sen, Jupiter mi cu a ttha bik, Mars mi cu a i theh.
chin_falam.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: A hring (oxygen) + a sen (atomic O) + a hring-dum (nitrogen). Magnet dawnglei naih ah hmuh a tha bik.
chin_falam.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Solar system chungah a ttha bik. Io mei tlang + Jupiter magnet hmun nih a peihter. A dinlomi UV aurora.
chin_falam.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Ni thli nih a peihter. Vawlei mi nakin rong a tlawm nain a ngan tuk. Ni tampi a um.
chin_falam.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: 98° kaunak ruangah a lam a dang. Hmanthlak lak a har.
chin_falam.weak_no_global_magnetic_field_auroras_: A der lo — vawlei pumpi magnet hmun a um lo. Vun ah a tangmi magnet kulh ah aurora a um.
chin_falam.10_missions_that_defined_planetary_exp: Planet hawlrelnak a khiahtu rian 10. Apollo in Cassini le JWST tiang.
chin_falam.first_humans_walk_on_moon: Mi cu Thla ah an kal hmasa bik
chin_falam.first_mars_landers_life_experiments: Mars tlaknak kuang hmasa bik + nunnak tuahsernak
chin_falam.nuclear_powered_rover_still_active: Nuclear tha rover, a rian a tuah rih
chin_falam.first_close_up_of_pluto_arrokoth: Pluto + Arrokoth naih hmanthlak hmasa bik
chin_falam.replaced_hubble_for_infrared_deep_fiel: Infrared deep field in Hubble a bawmh
chin_falam.brightness_counts_backward_smaller_bri: Ceunak cu a hnulei in an rel: a hme = a ceu deuh. Kan hmuhmi cu magnitude 60 a si.
chin_falam.faintest_naked_eye: Mit in kan hmuh khawh a der lo bik
chin_falam.magnitudes_count_backward_smaller_brig: Magnitude cu A HNULEI in an rel: a hme = a ceu deuh. Tuahsernak 5 cio = voi 100 a ceu deuh. Hipparchus nih 130 BCE ah a ser. Ni: -26.7. JWST nih mag 34 tiang a hmuh. A phaknak: 100^((34-(-26))/5) ≈ Ni nakin voi 10^24 a der lo.
chin_falam.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Van science mi nih van ah hmun an chimnak lam pali.
chin_falam.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Arfi he a i tlaihmi coordinate. Right ascension (h:m:s) + Declination (°). Van cazin ah an hman.
chin_falam.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Zoltu he a i tlaihmi. Altitude (vawlei donghnak cunglei) + Azimuth (dawnglei in). Telescope hmailei chiah awkah an hman.
chin_falam.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Ni-Vawlei zung he a i tlaihmi. Solar system thil caah an hman.
chin_falam.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Milky Way zung he a i tlaihmi. Galaxy cawnnak caah an hman.
chin_falam.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Van science mi nih coordinate system tampi an hman. Equatorial cu vawlei pumpi caah a si i Vawlei a hei zong ah thil cu coordinate khat a ngei peng. Alt-Az cu Vawlei a hei tikah zungzal in a thleng. Galactic cu Milky Way ser-ning cawn awkah a tha bik.
chin_falam.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Ni 1 in arfi 10^22 tiang. Van ngannak cu khuaruahhar a si.
chin_falam.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Van science cu ngannak khuaruahhar in rian a tuah. "Arfi zeizat dah a um?" — Vawlei ah tikulhkam vialte i seh nakin an tam deuh. "Kum zeizat dah?" — kum bilian 13.8. Asinain thil cheukhat (kua dum a dihnak) cu a ngan deuh rih.
chin_falam.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: Thil 36,500 nih sannak dang dang ah Vawlei an kulh. Sannak slider hnol law zei dah a um ti zoh.
chin_falam.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: Thil 36,500 kan zohmi + cheu milian tampi nih Vawlei an kulh. Kessler Syndrome ttihnak: i tonnak a tam ruangah van hman khawh lo a can. SpaceX Starlink nih vantlangkuang 5000+ a ngei; a tam deuh a timh rih.
chin_falam.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Mibu cio nih arfi ah tuanbia an hmuh. Grik ralthahnak in Aboriginal van Emu tiang.
chin_falam.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Vawlei pumpi mibu nih arfi cungah an chiahmi tuanbia. Australia Aboriginal van Emu nih vutdai vanmei dum a hman. Polynesia lam hngalhtu nih Pacific ah kal awkah arfi kha philhlo tein an hman. Van science zong cu tuanbia chimnak a si.
chin_falam.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: Arfi dang kulhah planet hmuh awkah lam 5. Transit + Doppler cu an tam bik.
chin_falam.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Arfi zoh law planet a luan tikah a ceunak a tlawm chin ti zoh. Kepler + TESS nih an hman.
chin_falam.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Planet gravity nih a arfi kha a i thlengter. Arfi ceunak ah Doppler shift bantuk kan hmuh.
chin_falam.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: A luanmi arfi+planet gravity nih arfi a hlat deuh mi ceunak a kau ter. Hlatnak he a i pehtlai lo.
chin_falam.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Arfi ceunak khap law a naihmi planet hmanthlak la. Atu tiang planet ngan/hlat caah lawng a tling.
chin_falam.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Pulsar kikirnak i thlengnak nih a kulhmi thil a langhter. Exoplanet hmasa bik cu hi lam in an hmuh (1992).
chin_falam.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Ni bantuk arfi kulhah exoplanet hmasa bik: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Atu ah 6,300+ an fiang cang. JWST nih exoplanet van thli spectroscopy a tuah — biosignature a hawl.
chin_falam.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: 2024-2079 thihnak caanzin. Maine i ni thihnak dihlak a dawtmi: 2079.
chin_falam.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Ni thihnak dihlak cu a hmuh a har. Vawlei hmun khat ah thla 18 cio ah pakhat a si, asinain pakhat cio cu lam tete in lawng an hmuh. Thla thihnak cu zanlei cheu dihlak in an hmuh.
chin_falam.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Hubble thleidangnak: kualnak, elliptical, irregular + an karlak mi vialte.
chin_falam.tight_arms_big_central_bulge: Kut a i naih, laili a ngan
chin_falam.loose_arms_small_bulge: Kut a hlat, laili a hmete
chin_falam.disk_but_no_arms: Disk a ngei nain kut a ngei lo
chin_falam.forming_stars_rapidly: A rangte in arfi a ser
chin_falam.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble nih 1936 ah galaxy a thleidang — "Hubble tuning fork." Kualnak + elliptical + irregular. Galaxy cu i pumhnak in a tho — Milky Way cu a nunnak laili ah a um; Andromeda he i pumhnak cu kum bilian tampi ah a cang kho (2025 cawnnak nih 50/50 hrawng a ti).
chin_falam.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Kalnak in ceunak rannak tiang (log tahnak). Voyager 1 cu mi nih a sermi thil a hlat bik a si i a leng lam ah kan probe a rang bik hna chungah pakhat, asinain van tahchunh ah a ttih tuk rih.
chin_falam.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 cu vantlangkuang tahchunh ah a rang i atu ah mi nih a sermi thil a hlat bik a si, asinain arfi a naih bik phak awkah kum 80,000 hrawng a hman lai. Ceunak nih cu khualtlawnnak khi kum 4 in a dih.
chin_falam.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Vutdai daimi in ni lum tiang arfi an cang ti zoh. Kum milian tlawmte chungah dinhmun 6.
chin_falam.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: Arfi cu molecular vanmei ngan in bu tein an chuak. A vialte in: kum milian tlawmte. Tahchunhnak hmingthang: Orion Nebula (M42), Eagle Nebula (Pillars of Creation), Tarantula Nebula.
chin_falam.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: Cosmology ah biahalnak a thuk bik le a hun rihmi 10. Cheukhat cu lehnak cheu an ngei; cheukhat cu thuhrukmi a si rih.
chin_falam.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Planet thil zohnak tebul rang. A kau, gravity, ni sawnak, thla.
chin_falam.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Planet thil biapi kha kil khat ah tahchunhnak. Vawlei = tahnak. Ni cu Vawlei a kau nakin voi 109 hrawng (a chung cu voi milian nakin a tam). Jupiter cu thla 115 kan hngalhmi a ngei. Venus cu a ttih tuk in a hei i a ni cu a kum nakin a saw deuh.
chin_falam.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: Zohnak + tuahnak thil hmete 40+. Siangngakchia le mi upa lungthawh mi caah sermi.
chin_falam.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: Tuahnak thil hmete 40+, SVG hmanthlak, le cawnnak simulation.
chin_falam.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Thla ser-ning dial in kua dum langhtertu le Foucault pendulum tiang, thil khat cio cu ruahnak har kha hmuh khawh le lentecelh khawh ah ser awkah an ser.
chin_falam.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: K-12 + mi upa lungthawh mi caah sermi. Thil vialte hun, asiloah pakhat lawng — pakhat cio nih amah te in rian a tuah.
chin_falam.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: AlloFlow STEM Lab cheu. Maine, USA ah sermi. Data vialte cu NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + mizapi science hmun in a si. Cawnnak caah hman cu a man a um lo.
chin_falam.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: Kum khat ah meteor ruah 9 + an zohnak ni tha bik. Na kalendar ah ttial.
chin_falam.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Meteor ruah cu Vawlei nih comet eek zam a luan tikah a cang. Zohnak tha bik: hmun dum, Thla a um lo, zanlai hnu. Perseids + Geminids cu kum khat ah ruah a zumhawk tlak bik a si.
chin_falam.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: Van science mi + van khualtlawngtu bia 10, khuaruahhar a langhtermi.
chin_falam.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: Nihin zan ah na mit lawng in asiloah binocular in na hmuh khawhmi thil 10.
chin_falam.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Mit in zohnak tha bik: hmun dum (khua ceunak in hlat), Thla cu vawlei donghnak tang ah, mit a i cawn cang (khuazing ah minute 20-30). App man a um lomi: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk nih na hmuhmi hngalh awkah an bawmh.
chin_falam.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Carl Sagan bia an chimtu tam bik. Kan hngalhmi mi vialte a ummi pixel khat.
chin_falam.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: "Hi hmun hlat in zoh ahcun, Vawlei cu zeihmanh a biapi lo bantuk a langh kho. Asinain kanmah caah cu a dang. Cu hmun kha ruah tthan. Cu cu hika a si. Cu cu inn a si. Cu cu kanmah kan si. A cungah na dawtmi mi vialte, na hngalhmi mi vialte, na theihmi mi vialte, a nungmi mi vialte cu an nunnak an nung."
chin_falam.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 nih hi Vawlei hmanthlak hi Feb 14, 1990 ah km bilian 6 hlat in a la — Carl Sagan halnak ruangah. Vawlei cu pixel khat lawng a si. Tuanbia chungah mi vialte cu cu pixel cungah an nung.
chin_falam.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: Van thuk thil hmingthang 8. Arfi chuahnak hmun, arfi a thimi vun, supernova a tangmi.
chin_falam.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Arfi chuahnak hmun ly 24 a kau. Orion Namsau ah mit in kan hmuh.
chin_falam.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: 1054 CE ah an hmuhmi supernova a tangmi. Pulsar a ngei.
chin_falam.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Lyra ah planetary nebula. Ni bantuk arfi a thi in a ceumi vun.
chin_falam.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Pillars of Creation inn (Hubble 1995). Arfi sernak dinnak.
chin_falam.complex_planetary_nebula_many_shell_la: Planetary nebula a fian har. Kikirnak in vun cheu tampi.
chin_falam.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Planetary nebula a naih bik. Van ah mit bantuk a langh.
chin_falam.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: Large Magellanic Cloud ah. Kan hngalhmi arfi sernak hmun a ngan bik.
chin_falam.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Kum ~8000 supernova a tangmi. Cygnus ah thlek ngan.
chin_falam.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Zoh thawk awkah na herhmi — app man um lo in telescope na man he a tlukmi tiang.
chin_falam.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Man um lo planetarium software. Khoika hmun in hmanh, zeitik ah hmanh zanlei van a langhter.
chin_falam.phone_app_point_at_sky_to_identify_wha: Phone app. Van ah hmailei chiah law na zohmi kha hngalh.
chin_falam.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Thawknak caah telescope tha bik. Jupiter Galilean thla, Andromeda, Pleiades bu a langhter.

chin_falam.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE asiloah Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
chin_falam.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Khua a tam bik nih pakhat an ngei. A tel mi nih telescope an puk, an cawnpiak, arfi zohnak pawl an tuah.
chin_falam.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Khua ceunak in minute 30+ hlat ah mong. Maine ah an tam. Katahdin Woods and Waters cu van dum himnak hmun an fiang termi a si.
chin_falam.most_important_tool_dark_sky_light_pol: Thil biapi bik: van dum. Ceunak nih arfi 90% a hlawh. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM le AMC Maine Woods cu International Dark Sky hmun an fiang termi a si; Acadia le Baxter zong ah van dum tha tuk an ngei.
chin_falam.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Arfi donghnak cu rithau cungah a hmang: brown dwarf, white dwarf, neutron arfi, asiloah kua dum.
chin_falam.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Arfi zeitin dah a thi timi cu a thawknak rithau cungah a hmang dih men. Neutron arfi + kua dum karlak donghnak cu a fiang lo (Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff donghnak ~2-3 M☉ a tangmi caah).
chin_falam.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: km 1 in ceunak-kum bilian 93 tiang. Van ngannak tebul.
chin_falam.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Hlatnak cu a i thleng ngan: km in AU, AU in ly, ly in bilian ly. Tuahsernak cio cu voi ~10,000-100,000 a ngan deuh. Van science cu log tahnak ah a nung.

chin_falam.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine cu van dum a tha tuk a ngei — khua dawnglei ah a tha bik. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM le AMC Maine Woods cu International Dark Sky hmun an fiang termi a si; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, le Cobscook zong an dum tha tuk. Khuasik zan cu a saw i a thiang tuk.
chin_falam.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: 2024-2027 van rian + thil biapi. Caan lungthawhawk ah kan nung.
chin_falam.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Van hawlrelnak cu a thar tthan lio a si. Ram thar (India, Japan, UAE), bu thar (SpaceX, Blue Origin), rian thar (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Cunglei zoh — i lungthin chiah.
chin_falam.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Solar system a chungmi + rithau i thennak zohnak rang.
chin_falam.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Ni nih solar system rithau vialte i 99.86% a ngei. Jupiter nih a tangmi 0.14% i thumnak pahnih a la. Vawlei + thil dang vialte cu a tangmi a si.
chin_falam.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Kan Luna in Triton + Enceladus tiang. Cheukhat cu Mercury nakin an ngan deuh.
